title: Meeting Notes Sync – import transcripts and AI summaries into Obsidian
abstract: Tired of manually整理meeting notes? Give Meeting Notes Sync a try! With just one click, import transcripts and AI summaries directly into Obsidian. Imagine capturing the conversation in real-time, with smart summaries highlighting key points—all without lifting a finger. Say goodbye to missing important details. Give it a shot!
abstract_zh: 你还在手动整理会议笔记吗？来试试 Meeting Notes Sync 吧！这回，只需一键导入转录和AI总结到Obsidian里，省时又高效。想象一下，会议现场的对话瞬间被记录下来，智能摘要帮你捕捉重点，再也不用担心漏掉任何细节了！赶紧试试吧！
